DisplayName.value: Tier 1 Common Ranged Weapons As Intro Buried Supplies Rewards

Description.value: Tier 1 Common Ranged Weapons As Intro Buried Supplies Rewards changes the rewards for completing the Intro Buried Supplies quest. Instead of Tier 0 pipe weapons and ammo, you choose from a set of common Tier 1 ranged weapons (Double Barrel Shotgun, Hunting Rifle, Iron Crossbow, Pistol, Wooden Bow).
